title: Doors Crucifix
description: This Adds The Crucifix From Roblox Doors
body:
- **This DataPack Adds The Crucifix From Roblox Doors, Use The Crucifix To Stop Any Entity In Your Way.**

**To Use The Crucifix Sneak Next To A Entity With The Crucifix Selected.**

If You Want To Play The Original Game Use This Link: https://www.roblox.com/games/6516141723/DOORS
- **Functions:**
- /function doors_crucifix:recipe
